notes: 1v1 fights only between the 130 rostered bots; rumbles, tag-team and multi-bot matches excluded. Modern-era pages parsed from {{Battle}} result templates; Comedy Central era pages without those templates parsed from Competition/Wins/Losses tables (no method info available there). Forfeits, byes, withdrawals and TBD/upcoming or unknown-result matches omitted (no fight took place). Destruct-A-Thon/Proving Ground live-show exhibition fights included under the 'Destruct-A-Thon/Proving Ground' season label. Fights deduplicated across both robots' pages by (pair, season, order), including known cross-page season-label mismatches (e.g. re:MARS fights filed under the adjacent World Championship on one page); 4 fights appear on only one robot's page and were kept. winner=null means draw/no winner declared.
